title: Regional Economic Impacts of the Just Energy Transition: Lessons for Coal Regions
abstract: The coal phase-out's regional economic impact is a key challenge of the energy transition, as employment and fiscal dependence in coal regions face structural adjustment without automatic market solutions. Analyzing European Union NUTS 2 regions from 2000-2022 with fixed effects and clustered errors, coal regions show a consistent 1.1 percentage points unemployment premium and grow faster in gross domestic product per capita at 0.2 percentage points annually, indicating a hollowing-out process where population exit raises per-capita output while employment conditions worsen. Spatial analysis shows strong geographic clustering, supporting coordinated local and sectoral targeted transition policies. South Korea's rapid phase-out, with Chungnam as a major coal-power region, underscores the need for proactive national support to enable concrete regional action before plants shut down.
tldr: 该论文研究煤炭淘汰对区域经济的冲击，发现煤炭地区失业率持续高出1.1个百分点，人均GDP增长略快，表明人口外流导致空心化，需要协调的地方和部门转型政策。
abstract_cn: 煤炭退出的区域经济影响是能源转型的关键挑战，因为煤炭地区的就业和财政依赖面临结构性调整，而市场无法自动提供解决方案。通过对2000-2022年欧盟NUTS 2地区进行固定效应和聚类误差分析，煤炭地区显示出持续高出1.1个百分点的失业溢价，同时人均国内生产总值每年以0.2个百分点的速度更快增长，这表明存在一种“空心化”过程：人口迁出提高了人均产出，但就业状况却持续恶化。空间分析显示出强烈的地理集聚性，支持采取协调一致的地方性和部门性定向转型政策。韩国快速推进煤炭退出，其中忠清南道（Chungnam）作为主要煤电地区，凸显了在电厂关闭之前，需要国家层面主动提供支持，以促成具体的区域行动。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Perturbed utility Markovian traffic equilibrium: theory and computation
abstract: Large-scale traffic assignment requires equilibrium models that are both behaviorally plausible and computationally tractable. This paper develops a perturbed utility Markovian equilibrium (PUME) framework that preserves the scalability of link-based Markovian traffic equilibrium models and extends their applicability to settings with boundary choice probabilities, undiscounted network loading, and general link interactions. As the behavioral basis of PUME, we first develop the perturbed utility Markovian choice model (PUMCM) in which the Bellman optimality operator is defined through a convex surplus function whose gradient directly yields the optimal policy. The model generalizes existing additive random utility (ARUM) Markovian choice models and admits both interior and boundary choice probabilities. Accordingly, unattractive links can receive zero flow without imposing ex ante choice-set restrictions as in existing ARUM models. We establish conditions under which the corresponding Markov decision problem is well posed and yields a proper demand mapping. We then formulate the equilibrium as a variational inequality (VI) problem on the dual cost space and establish its existence and uniqueness. Particularly, the VI formulation of PUME accommodates non-separable and asymmetric cost structures and thus offers a more flexible modeling framework than existing Markovian traffic equilibrium (MTE) models. For computation, we develop a modified policy iteration method for network loading and a safeguarded accelerated meta-algorithm for computing equilibrium. Both algorithms are proven to be globally convergent and have demonstrated satisfactory numerical performances. Experiments on benchmark and synthetic networks further show that the proposed framework is highly scalable and robust towards a wide variety of demand-supply settings.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个扰动效用马尔可夫交通均衡框架，用于大规模交通分配，具有行为合理性和计算可扩展性。
abstract_cn: 大规模交通分配需要既在行为上合理又在计算上易处理的均衡模型。本文提出了一种扰动效用马尔可夫均衡（PUME）框架，该框架保留了基于路段的马尔可夫交通均衡模型的可扩展性，并将其适用性扩展至具有边界选择概率、无折扣网络加载以及一般性路段交互的场景。作为PUME的行为基础，我们首先发展了扰动效用马尔可夫选择模型（PUMCM），其中贝尔曼最优性算子通过一个凸盈余函数定义，该函数的梯度直接产生最优策略。该模型推广了现有的加性随机效用（ARUM）马尔可夫选择模型，并同时允许内部选择概率和边界选择概率。因此，不具吸引力的路段可以接收零流量，而无需像现有ARUM模型那样施加事前选择集限制。我们建立了相应马尔可夫决策问题适定性并产生恰当需求映射的条件。随后，我们将均衡问题表述为对偶成本空间上的变分不等式（VI）问题，并证明了其存在性与唯一性。特别地，PUME的变分不等式表述能够容纳不可分离和非对称的成本结构，因此比现有马尔可夫交通均衡（MTE）模型提供了更灵活的建模框架。在计算方面，我们开发了一种用于网络加载的修正策略迭代方法，以及一种用于计算均衡的带保护加速元算法。两种算法均被证明具有全局收敛性，并展现出令人满意的数值表现。在基准网络和合成网络上的实验进一步表明，所提出的框架具有高度可扩展性，并对多种供需设置具有鲁棒性。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Ever since Ellsberg
abstract: Ellsberg's famous paradox challenged Savage's subjective expected utility theory (EUT) -- which reduces uncertainty to risk -- by suggesting an aversion toward ambiguity. We provide a revealed preference test of the full set of axioms underpinning subjective EUT under uncertainty and compare it to an analogous test of objective EUT under risk. We find that individual choices are as consistent with utility maximization and expected utility maximization under uncertainty as they are under risk. Nevertheless, there is greater empirical scope for non-EUT models under uncertainty than under risk, and the absolute and relative consistency of EUT and non-EUT models vary considerably across subjects.
tldr: 该论文通过揭示偏好测试，发现个体在不确定性下的选择与在风险下一样符合期望效用最大化，但非期望效用模型在不确定性下有更大的实证空间。
abstract_cn: 埃尔斯伯格著名悖论通过揭示人们对模糊性的厌恶，对萨维奇的主观期望效用理论（该理论将不确定性简化为风险）提出了挑战。我们提出了一种显示性偏好检验方法，用于检验支撑不确定性下主观期望效用理论的全部公理，并将其与风险下客观期望效用理论的类似检验进行比较。研究发现，个体在不确定性下的选择与在风险下的选择一样，均符合效用最大化和期望效用最大化原则。然而，不确定性下非期望效用理论模型的经验适用空间大于风险下，且期望效用理论与非期望效用理论模型的绝对一致性与相对一致性在不同被试间存在显著差异。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Voting Biases in Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO) Governance
abstract: Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs) use token-weighted voting to allocate resources, set protocol rules, and legitimate collective decisions. Yet, support in DAO voting is strikingly concentrated. What happens inside the ballot that produces this concentration? We study DAOs' governance at the proposal-choice level, linking each choice's voting-power share to three observable features: whether it expresses an approval-oriented stance, where it appears in the choice list, and whether it is selected by the proposal author. We find that (i) author-selected choices show the strongest and most robust association with voting-power share, with a 58.8% increase relative to non-author choices; (ii) approval-oriented choices retain a positive but slightly less consistent advantage (27.1%); and (iii) first-listed choices also attract systematically higher shares, consistent with position and order effects (7.7%). Results are robust across several specifications, which include subtracting an author's own voting power from computations. We use bias descriptively, to denote systematic associations rather than proven causal distortion. The results shift attention from proposal outcomes alone to the interface and social signals through which choices are presented. In DAO governance, ordering, author signals, and vote visibility should be treated as institutional design choices, not neutral implementation details.
tldr: 该论文研究DAO治理中投票权力的集中现象，发现作者选择的选项、支持性选项和列表位置与投票权力份额显著相关。
abstract_cn: 去中心化自治组织（Decentralized Autonomous Organizations, DAOs）采用代币加权投票来分配资源、制定协议规则并赋予集体决策合法性。然而，DAO投票中的支持度呈现出显著的集中趋势。投票过程中究竟发生了什么导致了这种集中？我们在提案选择层面研究DAO的治理，将每个选择的投票权份额与三个可观察特征联系起来：该选择是否表达支持导向立场、其在选择列表中的位置，以及是否由提案作者选定。我们发现：（i）作者选定的选择与投票权份额的关联最强且最稳健，相较于非作者选择增加了58.8%；（ii）支持导向的选择保持正向但一致性稍弱的优势（27.1%）；（iii）列表首位的选择也系统性地获得更高份额，这与位置效应和顺序效应一致（7.7%）。该结果在多种设定下保持稳健，包括从计算中扣除作者自身投票权的情况。我们描述性地使用“偏差”一词，指代系统性关联而非已证实的因果扭曲。研究结果将关注点从仅关注提案结果转向选择呈现的界面与社会信号。在DAO治理中，排序、作者信号及投票可见性应被视为制度设计选择，而非中立的实施细节。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Misspecified regressions with mixed regressors: robust inference and causal interpretation
abstract: For analytic convenience, existing statistical frameworks either assume random or fixed regressors. However, it is a little awkward that they do not cover the practical case of estimating the average treatment effect in experiments with randomized treatments and non-randomized, fixed pretreatment covariates. We unify the literature by providing the theory for regressions with mixed regressors that contain both random and fixed components. Importantly, our theory allows for misspecification of the regression functions. We first establish general results for estimating equations with both random and fixed components and then use it to analyze misspecified linear regression, with applications to completely randomized experiments. We focus on the causal interpretation of the regression coefficients and standard errors even when the models are wrong. We start with the theory for independent data and then extend the discussion to clustered data.
tldr: 该论文为包含随机和固定成分的混合回归模型提供了理论框架，允许回归函数误设，并应用于完全随机实验的因果推断。
abstract_cn: 为便于分析，现有统计框架通常假设回归变量为随机或固定。然而，这些框架未能涵盖在随机化处理与非随机化固定预处理协变量的实验中估计平均处理效应的实际情形，这略显不足。我们通过提供同时包含随机与固定成分的混合回归变量回归理论，统一了相关文献。重要的是，我们的理论允许回归函数的设定存在错误。我们首先建立了同时包含随机与固定成分的估计方程的一般性结论，进而将其用于分析设定错误的线性回归，并应用于完全随机化实验。我们重点关注即便模型错误时回归系数与标准误的因果解释。我们从独立数据的理论出发，随后将讨论扩展至聚类数据。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Media Measurement and the Assisted Own Goal: Attribution, Marketing-Mix Models, and Individual-Level Incrementality
abstract: We use the assisted own goal hypothesis as a lens into media measurement. A demand-generating (upper-funnel) advertising platform such as a short-video social network can cause an incremental purchase, yet see that purchase booked on -- and credited to -- a downstream trusted marketplace, because consumers who discover a product on the platform complete the transaction elsewhere, for example because of distrust of the generating platform as a psychological mechanism. Under attribution-based return-on-ad-spend (ROAS) measurement, the diverted conversions are invisible to the originating platform. Marketing-mix models (MMMs) do not know which channel to credit with the outcome, and channel-by-week aggregation denies the audience-level granularity that budget decisions require. We develop an incrementality-based measurement model with two ingredients: ambient audience-level randomization -- each activated audience carries its own intent-to-treat (ITT) experiment -- and an individual-level extension of Predicted Incrementality by Experimentation (PIE), which learns a mapping from individual features to experiment-identified incremental outcomes. Because ITT contrasts are computed on channel-complete outcomes, the estimator is unbiased and the own goal disappears
tldr: 论文通过'助攻乌龙球'假设研究媒体测量中的归因偏差，提出基于增量性的测量模型解决广告归因问题。
abstract_cn: 我们以“乌龙助攻”假说为视角，探讨媒体测量问题。需求驱动型（漏斗上层）广告平台（如短视频社交网络）可能促成增量购买，但该购买行为却会被记录并归因于下游的可信交易市场——这是因为消费者在该平台发现产品后，出于对生成平台的不信任等心理机制，选择在其他平台完成交易。在基于归因的广告支出回报率（ROAS）测量中，这些被转移的转化行为对原始平台而言是不可见的。营销组合模型（MMMs）无法确定应将结果归因于哪个渠道，而按周聚合的渠道数据又无法提供预算决策所需的受众层级粒度。我们开发了一种基于增量性的测量模型，包含两个要素：环境层面的受众随机化——每个被激活的受众都携带自身的意向处理效应（ITT）实验——以及个体层面的“通过实验预测增量性（PIE）”扩展方法，该方法学习从个体特征到实验识别出的增量结果之间的映射关系。由于ITT对比基于渠道完整的结果进行计算，该估计量是无偏的，从而消除了“乌龙助攻”现象。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Deep Learning for Dynamic Programming with Recursive Utility Using First-order Conditions
abstract: This paper proposes the certainty-equivalent first-order learning (CEFOL) algorithm, a deep learning algorithm for solving discrete-time dynamic programming problems with recursive utility. Dynamic programming with recursive utility is challenging because nonlinear certainty equivalent appears in the Bellman equation and the first-order optimality conditions but is difficult to evaluate. By introducing a separate neural network to represent the certainty equivalent, CEFOL enables the exploitation of the Bellman and model-specific first-order optimality conditions. In addition to certainty equivalent, CEFOL also uses neural networks to learn the value functions, policy functions, and Lagrange multipliers by using model-specific first-order conditions to construct residuals for minimization. By using first-order and KKT residuals to learn the policy, CEFOL directly accommodates general equality and inequality constraints on the controls, including occasionally binding constraints, without requiring penalty functions or problem-specific reformulations. We apply the algorithm to risk-sensitive and Epstein--Zin consumption-saving problems, a small-noise robust-control problem, and a DSGE model with recursive preferences and stochastic volatility. Across these applications, out-of-sample Bellman diagnostics and model-specific optimality residuals, including Euler or first-order residuals where applicable, are generally of order 1.0e-4 to 1.0e-3 over the relevant state regions, with larger values mainly near binding constraints, and the learned value and policy functions closely match VFI benchmarks when available. The CEFOL algorithm also works for dynamic programming problems with expected utility, as expected utility is a special case of recursive utility.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的CEFOL算法，用于求解具有递归效用的动态规划问题，并通过数值实验验证了算法的有效性。
abstract_cn: 本文提出确定性等价一阶学习（CEFOL）算法，这是一种用于求解具有递归效用的离散时间动态规划问题的深度学习算法。具有递归效用的动态规划之所以具有挑战性，是因为非线性确定性等价出现在贝尔曼方程和一阶最优性条件中，但难以评估。通过引入一个独立的神经网络来表示确定性等价，CEFOL能够利用贝尔曼条件及模型特定的一阶最优性条件。除确定性等价外，CEFOL还使用神经网络来学习价值函数、策略函数和拉格朗日乘子，通过利用模型特定的一阶条件构建残差以进行最小化。通过使用一阶条件和KKT残差来学习策略，CEFOL直接适应控制变量上的一般等式和不等式约束，包括偶尔起作用的约束，而无需惩罚函数或针对特定问题的重新表述。我们将该算法应用于风险敏感型和Epstein-Zin消费储蓄问题、一个小噪声鲁棒控制问题，以及一个具有递归偏好和随机波动率的DSGE模型。在这些应用中，在相关状态区域上，样本外贝尔曼诊断指标和模型特定的最优性残差（包括适用的欧拉残差或一阶残差）通常处于1.0e-4至1.0e-3量级，较大值主要出现在约束起作用边界附近；当存在价值函数迭代（VFI）基准时，学习得到的价值函数和策略函数与之高度匹配。CEFOL算法同样适用于具有期望效用的动态规划问题，因为期望效用是递归效用的一个特例。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Non-Equilibrium Economics: A Physicist's Point of View
abstract: Financial and economic history is strewn with bubbles and crashes, booms and busts, crises and upheavals of all sorts. Understanding the origin of these events is arguably one of the most important problems in economic theory: are economies intrinsically unstable, and can one ``stabilize unstable economies''? In this review I argue, from a physicist's vantage point, that the concept of equilibrium -- so central to mainstream economic thinking -- is likely to be the exception rather than the rule in large, complex, interacting systems. Drawing on a series of stylized ``toy'' models, I show how excess volatility, endogenous crises and crashes, inflation swells and persistent inequalities can all emerge naturally from genuinely out-of-equilibrium dynamics, without invoking large exogenous shocks. Three generic mechanisms recur throughout: trapping in a multiplicity of history-dependent equilibria; the impossibility of dynamically reaching equilibrium, leading to oscillations and chaos; and the spontaneous evolution towards fragile, marginally stable states -- the self-organized criticality paradigm. I stress that these are phenomenological scenarios rather than calibrated theories: there is, at this stage, no ``smoking gun''. But the burden of proof, I contend, should be on the equilibrium camp.
tldr: 论文从物理学视角论证经济系统本质上是非均衡的，认为危机、泡沫和通胀等源于内生动态而非外部冲击。
abstract_cn: 金融与经济史上充斥着各类泡沫与崩盘、繁荣与萧条、危机与动荡。理解这些事件的起源，可以说是经济理论中最重要的问题之一：经济体本质上是否不稳定？人们能否“稳定不稳定的经济体”？在本综述中，我从物理学家的视角提出，均衡这一主流经济学的核心概念，在大型、复杂、相互作用的系统中，很可能只是特例而非普遍规律。通过一系列程式化的“玩具”模型，我展示了过度波动、内生性危机与崩盘、通胀膨胀以及持续的不平等如何能够自然地产生于真正的非均衡动力学中，而无需借助大规模外生冲击。三种通用机制贯穿始终：陷入多重历史依赖的均衡态；动态上无法达到均衡，导致振荡与混沌；以及自发演化至脆弱、边际稳定的状态——即自组织临界性范式。我强调，这些是现象学情景而非经过校准的理论：在现阶段，尚不存在“确凿证据”。但我认为，举证责任应落在均衡阵营一方。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: From Centrality Discounts to Centrality Premia: Interoperability and Platform Competition in Social Networks
abstract: We study how interoperability reshapes competitive price discrimination when consumers are embedded in a social network. Two differentiated platforms set personalized prices; consumers benefit from neighbors' consumption of the same platform and, under interoperability, of the rival. Equilibrium prices obtain in closed form for arbitrary networks and contain a network-position term, proportional to Katz-Bonacich centrality, whose sign is determined by whether interoperability exceeds product substitutability. Below this threshold, platforms contest central consumers and grant centrality discounts; above it, central consumers become gateways to a shared cross-platform network and pay premia; at the threshold, prices are independent of network position. Interoperability softens price competition, can make platforms favor denser consumer networks, and reverses which side of the market gains from price discrimination.
tldr: 该论文研究互操作性如何改变社交网络中平台竞争的价格歧视，发现当互操作性低于产品替代性时，中心消费者获得折扣，反之则支付溢价。
abstract_cn: 我们研究了当消费者嵌入社交网络时，互操作性（interoperability）如何重塑竞争性价格歧视。两个差异化平台设定个性化价格；消费者从邻居使用同一平台中获益，而在互操作性条件下，也能从邻居使用竞争平台中获益。对于任意网络结构，均衡价格均以闭式解形式获得，其中包含一个网络位置项，该项与卡茨-博纳西奇中心度（Katz-Bonacich centrality）成正比，其正负号取决于互操作性是否超过产品替代性。低于该阈值时，平台争夺中心消费者并给予中心度折扣；高于该阈值时，中心消费者成为共享跨平台网络的网关并支付溢价；在阈值处，价格与网络位置无关。互操作性缓和了价格竞争，可能使平台偏好密度更高的消费者网络，并逆转了市场哪一方从价格歧视中获益。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Large-Scale Portfolio Optimization Problem Under Cardinality Constraint With Enhanced Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms
abstract: Decision-making is posing an increasingly formidable challenge to investors because of the growing number of alternatives available in financial markets. A hot area of research over the past few decades has been portfolio optimization that seeks to determine how much an investor should invest in which asset. Introducing real-world conditions to the optimization model turns the problem into an NP-hard one for whose solution exact methods become inefficient; hence, researchers have turned to evolutionary algorithms to approximate solutions. In this paper, strengthening strategies are presented for multi-objective evolutionary algorithms that can provide a faster convergence rate and extensive search ability in the portfolio optimization problem under the cardinality constraint. To implement those features, a unique solution representation, a novel operator, and new repair mechanisms are introduced for solving the aforementioned problem in which lower and upper limits are set on the number of assets in the portfolio. For this purpose, new mating strategies along with the aforesaid package are implemented in well-known multi-objective evolutionary algorithms to solve the problem. The customized algorithms are subsequently tested against traditional ones using well-known market indices as benchmarks. Results indicate that the proposed strategy not only provides better approximations but also converges faster as well at no loss of performance with an increasing number of assets in the market.
tldr: 该论文提出增强的多目标进化算法来解决带有基数约束的大规模投资组合优化问题，通过新的解表示、算子和修复机制实现更快的收敛和更好的近似解。
abstract_cn: 决策正对投资者构成日益严峻的挑战，原因在于金融市场中可供选择的投资标的数量持续增长。过去几十年的研究热点之一便是投资组合优化，其旨在确定投资者应在各类资产上投入多少资金。将现实条件引入优化模型后，该问题转化为NP难问题，精确求解方法对此类问题效率低下；因此，研究者转而采用进化算法来获取近似解。本文针对基数约束下的投资组合优化问题，提出了多目标进化算法的强化策略，该策略能够实现更快的收敛速度与广泛的搜索能力。为实现这些特性，我们引入了独特的解表示方法、新型算子及新的修复机制，以解决上述问题中投资组合资产数量存在上下限约束的情形。为此，我们将新型交配策略与前述方案相结合，在经典多目标进化算法中实施以求解该问题。随后，以知名市场指数为基准，将定制化算法与传统算法进行对比测试。结果表明，所提策略不仅能提供更优的近似解，而且收敛速度更快，且随着市场中资产数量的增加，其性能不会出现损失。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: A novel robust mixed integer linear programming model for index tracking problem under no rebalancing: heuristic optimization approach
abstract: Passive management has increasingly won popularity over the past few years because of its advantages, such as lower management fees and transaction costs. Index tracking endeavors to reproduce the performance of an index with smaller sets of assets. In this paper, a novel formulation is proposed that is not only more robust than the existing ones but also performs better on out-of-sample data and tracks indices over long periods without any considerable deviation or the need for rebalancing. Solving index tracking problems in a polynomial time is a challenging task due to their NP-hard nature. To address this issue, a novel heuristic based on metaheuristic algorithms and local branching is also developed to solve the proposed model. The heuristic enjoys not only the exploration capabilities of a genetic algorithm but the characteristics of local search algorithms as well. The data from the OR library is used to verify the capabilities of the proposed heuristic in comparison with commercial solvers. Results indicate that not only is the heuristic able to converge to optimal solutions for not-so-large problem sizes, but the portfolios it generates also outperform those yielded by commercial solvers in terms of both in-sample and out-of-sample data.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的鲁棒混合整数线性规划模型，用于在无需再平衡的情况下进行指数追踪，并开发了基于元启发式算法和局部分支的启发式求解方法，实验表明该模型在样本内外数据上表现优于商业求解器。
abstract_cn: 被动管理在过去几年中日益受到青睐，这得益于其较低的管理费和交易成本等优势。指数跟踪旨在利用较小规模的资产组合复制指数的表现。本文提出了一种新颖的模型公式，该公式不仅比现有模型更具鲁棒性，而且在样本外数据上表现更优，能够长期跟踪指数而不会出现显著偏差或需要再平衡。由于指数跟踪问题具有NP-hard（非确定性多项式时间困难）特性，在多项式时间内求解是一项具有挑战性的任务。为解决这一问题，本文还开发了一种基于元启发式算法（metaheuristic algorithms）和局部分支（local branching）的新型启发式算法，用于求解所提出的模型。该启发式算法不仅具备遗传算法（genetic algorithm）的探索能力，还兼具局部搜索算法的特性。利用OR库（OR library）中的数据，将所提出的启发式算法与商业求解器进行对比验证。结果表明，该启发式算法不仅能够在问题规模不大时收敛到最优解，而且其生成的资产组合在样本内和样本外数据上的表现均优于商业求解器所得结果。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Does Regulation Bite at Gateways? Evidence from MiCA and Stablecoins
abstract: Gateways are trading venues where regulation can change the assets investors can trade. We study this margin using MiCA-EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation-which led several exchanges to delist USDT pairs for European Economic Area users, while USDC obtained MiCA authorization. First, aggregate market shares and trading volumes barely move. Second, comparing Regulated-facing exchanges with globally oriented exchanges where MiCA is less likely to bind, we show that the cross-section shifts toward USDC-USDC share rises by 0.82 and relative trading volume by 0.54 pre-event standard deviations. Both reflect USDT trading contracting where it is delisted.
tldr: 该论文研究欧盟MiCA监管对稳定币交易的影响，发现虽然USDT被下架，但整体市场交易量变化不大，而USDC的市场份额和交易量相对上升。
abstract_cn: 交易网关是监管机构能够改变投资者可交易资产类别的交易场所。我们利用欧盟《加密资产市场法规》（MiCA）研究这一边际效应——该法规导致多家交易所对欧洲经济区（EEA）用户下架USDT交易对，而USDC则获得了MiCA授权。首先，总体市场份额与交易量几乎未发生变动。其次，通过比较受监管导向的交易所与MiCA约束较弱的全球导向型交易所，我们发现截面数据呈现向USDC的转移——USDC份额上升0.82个事前标准差，相对交易量上升0.54个事前标准差。两者均反映出USDT在其被下架的交易场所中交易量收缩。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

tldr: 该论文简要探讨了银行稳定性研究的演变与动态，总结了影响银行稳定性的关键因素（如资本、风险、监管）及其相互关系。

title: The Computational Transmission Gap: Monetary Policy, Inflation Persistence, and Sovereignty Risks in AI-Mediated Markets
abstract: This paper examines whether AI-mediated discovery, ranking, pricing, verification, and transaction execution introduce a new friction into monetary-policy transmission. It defines the Computational Transmission Gap (CTG) as the difference between the monetary-policy response potentially available to an economic entity under identified financial conditions and the response actually realised after computational discovery, eligibility, ranking, verification, and action constraints are taken into account. The paper proposes a computational transmission coefficient linking transmission effectiveness to Computational Visibility, Computational Eligibility, verifiability, Agent Readiness, and Agent Actionability. It distinguishes entity-level attenuation from aggregate reallocation, external leakage, and genuinely unrealised activity, developing a staged accounting framework for demand conservation in computationally mediated markets. A sectoral, computationally augmented inflation framework is proposed, with implications for inflation persistence, sectoral dispersion, output-gap interpretation, and monetary-policy observability. The framework is applied to European real estate as a high-sensitivity test market. An illustrative and non-empirical numerical simulation examines direct attenuation, convex ranking, capacity constraints, domestic recovery, and cross-border allocation. The paper does not claim that monetary policy is ineffective or that traditional transmission channels have disappeared. It argues that monetary policy may remain financially operative while becoming computationally incomplete, with heterogeneous outcomes depending on the computational allocation characteristics of firms, assets, and households. No causal estimates or validated empirical results are reported. All proposed mechanisms, indices, and hypotheses require empirical testing. Representation Economy Research Programme — Volume XI, Research Layer 20.Working Paper, Version 1.4.Not peer reviewed.

tldr: 论文提出AI中介市场导致货币政策传导出现计算缺口，使货币政策在金融上有效但在计算上不完全，从而影响通胀持续性和金融稳定。
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了由人工智能驱动的发现、排序、定价、验证及交易执行是否在货币政策传导中引入了新的摩擦。本文将“计算传导缺口”（Computational Transmission Gap, CTG）定义为：在已识别的金融条件下，经济实体潜在可获得的货币政策响应，与在考虑计算发现、资格认定、排序、验证及行动约束后实际实现的响应之间的差异。本文提出了一个计算传导系数，将传导效率与计算可见性（Computational Visibility）、计算资格（Computational Eligibility）、可验证性、智能体就绪度（Agent Readiness）及智能体可操作性（Agent Actionability）联系起来。本文区分了实体层面的衰减与总量再配置、外部泄漏以及真正未实现的活动，并针对计算中介市场中的需求守恒构建了一个分阶段核算框架。本文提出了一个分部门的、经计算增强的通胀框架，并探讨了其对通胀持续性、部门分化、产出缺口解释以及货币政策可观测性的影响。该框架被应用于欧洲房地产市场，作为高敏感性测试市场。本文还进行了一项说明性且非经验性的数值模拟，考察了直接衰减、凸性排序、容量约束、国内复苏及跨境配置。本文并未声称货币政策无效或传统传导渠道已经消失，而是认为货币政策可能在财务上仍然有效，但在计算上变得不完整，其异质性结果取决于企业、资产及家庭的计算分配特征。本文未报告任何因果估计或经过验证的实证结果。所有提出的机制、指数及假设均需接受实证检验。表征经济学研究计划——第十一卷，研究层20。工作论文，版本1.4。未经同行评审。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: The Impact of Exchange Rate Fluctuations on the Trade of China: Evidence from a Dynamic Simulated ARDL
abstract: This paper examines how the exchange rate volatility of the Renminbi (RMB), money supply, inflation, and interest rates affect the balance of trade in China based on time-series data throughout 1990 to 2022. Although most of the traditional macroeconomic determinants have been studied and reported, this study is a new input since it uses the ARDL bounds testing method as well as an advanced dynamic simulated ARDL model to identify the intricate long-run and short-run intercept. Order of variables are I(0) and I(1), confirmed by unit root testing, the Augmented Dickey-Fuller test, which explains the application of the ARDL framework. The results of the bounds test suggest that there is a long-term, co-integrating relationship between the variables. Empirical evidence indicates that volatility in the exchange rate in the RMB has a strong positive impact on the trade balance both in the short and long term. Inflation and interest rates, on the other hand, exhibit a very strong negative long-term influence. The findings indicate that although the RMB is comparatively a minor factor to the total trade variance, its volatility is an imperative instrument in ensuring a desirable trade position. The results of this study provide policy makers with important information to optimize the monetary policies on trade and dealing with currency changes in a way that would guarantee a stable economic balance. Through the dynamic simulated ARDL method, this study presents a very precise forecasting instrument in the quest to comprehend the changing role of China in international trade environment.
journal: Chinese Economy
tldr: 该论文利用动态模拟ARDL模型研究1990-2022年人民币汇率波动、货币供应、通胀和利率对中国贸易收支的影响，发现汇率波动短期和长期对贸易收支有显著正向影响，而通胀和利率有显著负向影响。
abstract_cn: 本文基于1990年至2022年的时间序列数据，考察了人民币汇率波动、货币供应量、通货膨胀及利率如何影响中国的贸易收支。尽管大多数传统宏观经济决定因素已被研究并报道，但本研究提供了新的视角，因为它采用了自回归分布滞后（ARDL）边界检验方法以及先进的动态模拟ARDL模型，以识别复杂的长期与短期截距项。通过单位根检验（即增广迪基-富勒检验）确认变量阶数为I(0)和I(1)，这解释了ARDL框架的适用性。边界检验结果表明，变量之间存在长期协整关系。实证证据显示，人民币汇率波动在短期和长期内均对贸易收支产生强烈的正向影响。而通货膨胀和利率则表现出非常显著的长期负向影响。研究结果表明，尽管人民币对总贸易变动的贡献相对较小，但其波动性是确保理想贸易地位的重要工具。本研究的结果为政策制定者提供了重要信息，以优化贸易货币政策并应对汇率变动，从而保障经济稳定平衡。通过动态模拟ARDL方法，本研究为理解中国在国际贸易环境中不断变化的角色提供了极为精确的预测工具。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: VALYUTA KURSI VA MEHNAT BOZORI BARQARORLIGI O'RTASIDAGI MAKROIQTISODIY MUVOZANATNI TA'MINLASHDA MONETAR SIYOSATNING ROLI
abstract: Annotatsiya. Ushbu maqolada monetar siyosatning valyuta kursi va mehnat bozori barqarorligi o‘rtasidagi makroiqtisodiy muvozanatni ta’minlashdagi roli o‘rganiladi. Tadqiqotda valyuta kursi tebranishlarining bandlik darajasi, ishsizlik va real ish haqi kabi asosiy mehnat bozori ko‘rsatkichlariga ta’siri tahlil qilinadi. Shuningdek, foiz stavkasi, pul massasi va valyuta intervensiyalari kabi monetar siyosat instrumentlarining iqtisodiy muvozanatni shakllantirishdagi samaradorligi baholanadi. Tadqiqot natijalari monetar siyosat vositalari orqali makroiqtisodiy barqarorlikni ta’minlash va mehnat bozori samaradorligini oshirish bo‘yicha ilmiy xulosalar ishlab chiqishga xizmat qiladi. Kalit so‘zlar: monetar siyosat, valyuta kursi, mehnat bozori, makroiqtisodiy muvozanat, bandlik, ishsizlik, foiz stavkasi Аннотация. В данной статье рассматривается роль монетарная политика в обеспечении макроэкономического равновесия между валютный курс и рынок труда. В исследовании анализируется влияние колебаний валютного курса на ключевые показатели рынка труда, включая занятость, уровень безработицы и реальную заработную плату. Также оценивается эффективность инструментов монетарной политики, таких как процентные ставки, денежная масса и валютные интервенции, в формировании экономического равновесия. Полученные результаты позволяют сформировать научные выводы по обеспечению макроэкономической стабильности и повышению эффективности рынка труда. Ключевые слова: монетарная политика, валютный курс, рынок труда, макроэкономическое равновесие, занятость, безработица, процентная ставка Abstract. This article examines the role of monetary policy in ensuring macroeconomic equilibrium between the exchange rate and the labor market. The study analyzes the impact of exchange rate fluctuations on key labor market indicators, including employment, unemployment, and real wages. It also evaluates the effectiveness of monetary policy instruments such as interest rates, money supply, and foreign exchange interventions in maintaining economic balance. The findings contribute to developing scientific conclusions on ensuring macroeconomic stability and improving labor market efficiency. Keywords: monetary policy, exchange rate, labor market, macroeconomic equilibrium, employment, unemployment, interest rate

tldr: 该论文研究了货币政策在维持汇率与劳动力市场之间宏观经济均衡中的作用，分析了汇率波动对就业、失业和实际工资的影响，并评估了利率、货币供应和外汇干预等工具的有效性。
abstract_cn: 摘要：本文探讨了货币政策在确保汇率与劳动力市场之间宏观经济均衡中的作用。研究分析了汇率波动对就业水平、失业率及实际工资等关键劳动力市场指标的影响。同时，评估了利率、货币供应量及外汇干预等货币政策工具在形成经济均衡中的有效性。研究结果有助于形成关于通过货币政策工具确保宏观经济稳定并提升劳动力市场效率的科学结论。关键词：货币政策（monetary policy），汇率（exchange rate），劳动力市场（labor market），宏观经济均衡（macroeconomic equilibrium），就业（employment），失业（unemployment），利率（interest rate）

title: Dual-track monetary transmission and corporate debt structure: evidence and policy lessons from India
abstract: We examine how monetary policy influences corporate debt composition in India using firm-level data from 2001 to 2024. We find that a market-based indicator, the Treasury yield, induces deleveraging in total, bank, and bond debt, especially among listed and business-group-affiliated firms. By contrast, policy tightening often coincides with sustained or higher bank leverage for these firms, whereas promoter-controlled firms consistently deleverage. Bond-financing adjustments emerge mainly with lags and among a smaller set of issuers. The findings reveal segmented monetary transmission shaped by ownership and governance, underscoring the need for deeper bond markets, greater transparency, and heterogeneity-sensitive prudential oversight.
journal: Macroeconomics and Finance in Emerging Market Economies
tldr: 本文利用印度企业数据发现，货币政策通过市场利率（国债收益率）影响企业去杠杆，但政策紧缩时部分企业银行杠杆反而上升，表明货币政策传导因所有权和治理结构而异。
abstract_cn: 本研究利用2001至2024年印度企业层面数据，考察货币政策如何影响企业债务构成。研究发现，以市场为基础的指标——国债收益率（Treasury yield）会引致总债务、银行债务及债券债务的去杠杆化，这一效应在上市公司及企业集团附属公司中尤为显著。相比之下，政策紧缩往往与这些企业持续或更高的银行杠杆率相伴，而发起人控制的企业则持续去杠杆。债券融资调整主要呈现滞后性，且仅出现在少数发行人群体中。研究结果揭示了由所有权与治理结构所分割的货币政策传导机制，凸显了深化债券市场、提升透明度以及实施考虑异质性的审慎监管的必要性。

analysis.chinese_title: 双重传导机制下的货币传导与企业债务结构：来自印度的证据与政策启示
analysis.summary: 本文利用2001年至2024年印度企业层面数据，研究货币政策如何影响企业债务构成。研究发现，以国债收益率为代表的市场化指标会促使企业去杠杆，降低总债务、银行债务和债券债务，尤其是上市公司和集团关联企业。相反，政策紧缩时，这些企业的银行杠杆率往往维持或上升，而发起人控制的企业则持续去杠杆。债券融资调整主要存在滞后效应，且仅发生在少数发行企业中。结果表明，货币传导因所有权和治理结构而呈现分割特征，凸显了深化债券市场、提高透明度以及实施对异质性敏感的审慎监管的必要性。
innovations: 首次利用印度长期企业面板数据（2001-2024）系统分析货币政策对企业债务结构的影响。
区分市场导向指标（国债收益率）与政策利率，揭示不同传导渠道的异质性效应。
发现所有权和治理结构（如上市公司、集团关联、发起人控制）在货币传导中的关键调节作用。
揭示债券融资调整的滞后性和有限性，为债券市场发展提供微观证据。
analysis.methodology: 使用2001年至2024年印度企业层面数据，通过面板回归模型分析货币政策指标（如国债收益率）对企业总债务、银行债务和债券债务杠杆率的影响，并区分不同所有权和治理结构的企业子样本。
key_results: 国债收益率上升导致企业总债务、银行债务和债券债务去杠杆。
政策紧缩时，上市公司和集团关联企业的银行杠杆率维持或上升，而发起人控制企业持续去杠杆。
债券融资调整存在滞后，且仅发生在少数发行企业中。
货币传导因所有权和治理结构而呈现分割特征。
analysis.tech_stack: 摘要未提供具体算法、工具或数学方法。
strengths: 使用长期（2001-2024）企业层面数据，覆盖完整经济周期。
区分市场指标与政策利率，提供更细致的传导机制分析。
关注所有权和治理结构的异质性，政策含义明确。

title: MONEY DEMAND AND LIQUIDITY INERTIA UNDER MACROECONOMIC UNCERTAINTY THRESHOLDS IN G7 ECONOMIES: EVIDENCE FROM MACHINE LEARNING AND NONLINEAR DSGE ANALYSIS
abstract: Abstract The standard linear monetary frameworks systematically miss the asymmetric changes in aggregate liquidity preferences in times of great macroeconomic stress of uncertainty. To address this structural shortcoming, the study examines the demand for money in the G7 economies (2000-2025) based on a new dual-framework: the Machine Learning-Cross-Sectionally Augmented Panel Smooth Transition Regression (ML-CS-PSTR) model and the third-order perturbed non-linear Dynamic Stochastic General Equilibrium (DSGE) model. We endogenously identify significant threshold in systemic risk using Bayesian Additive Regression Trees (BART). The macroeconomic design collapses when the composite index of economic policy uncertainty and financial crises exceeds 1.84 standard deviations. Markets below this threshold are mean reverting efficiently, trading at 28.5% per quarter. Above that, economic agents move into a high degree of precautionary saving (68.9% in the regime), inducing a regime-induced liquidity inertia and contraction for which the speed of adjustment drops to 9.2%. In addition, our non-linear DSGE variance decomposition result scientifically establishes that this slowdown is structurally attributed to the policy uncertainty shocks that persist in the economy that dominate the variance in money demand in the long run, and which are far more influential than the standard monetary policy reaction by central banks. This is supported by factor-augmented co-integration and heterogeneous causality tests that show a refined two-way causality chain between financial integration and currency volatility during threshold crises and therefore, conventional Taylor rules are not effective in this case. The threshold estimates indicate that standard Uncovered Interest Rate Parity (UIP) does not hold true during these panic periods. Based on the results, central banks should move beyond linear rate targeting to aggressive forward guidance and macro-stability policy actions and countercyclical exchange buffers for the goal of restoring market clearing mechanisms. A liquidity crisis cannot be resolved by a central bank by just increasing or decreasing the broad money supply. Policymakers should fiercely end the cloud of uncertainty if they want to restore the normal market clearing speeds. This involves coordination of fiscal and monetary policies through hyper transparent forward guidance and long-term horizons, which will help to calm markets, thereby reducing the precautionary hoarding elasticity back to baseline levels. JEL Classification: E41, C23, E52, F41, D81.

tldr: 论文通过机器学习和非线性DSGE模型，发现G7经济体的货币需求在宏观经济不确定性超过阈值时出现流动性惯性，传统货币政策失效，需要财政与货币政策协调。
abstract_cn: 摘要 标准线性货币框架系统性地忽略了在宏观经济面临巨大不确定性压力时期，总体流动性偏好的非对称变化。为弥补这一结构性缺陷，本研究基于一种新的双重框架——机器学习-截面增广面板平滑转换回归（ML-CS-PSTR）模型与三阶扰动非线性动态随机一般均衡（DSGE）模型，对七国集团经济体（2000-2025年）的货币需求进行了考察。我们利用贝叶斯加性回归树（BART）内生识别出系统性风险的显著阈值。当经济政策不确定性与金融危机的综合指数超过1.84个标准差时，宏观经济设计便会崩溃。低于该阈值的市场呈现高效均值回归特性，每季度交易速度为28.5%。而高于该阈值时，经济主体转向高度预防性储蓄（该机制下比例为68.9%），引发机制驱动的流动性惯性与收缩，调整速度降至9.2%。此外，我们的非线性DSGE方差分解结果科学地证实，这一放缓在结构上归因于持续存在于经济中的政策不确定性冲击，这些冲击长期主导货币需求的方差，其影响力远超央行的标准货币政策反应。这一结论得到了因子增广协整与异质性因果检验的支持，这些检验揭示了在阈值危机期间金融一体化与货币波动之间存在精细的双向因果链，因此传统的泰勒规则在此情形下失效。阈值估计表明，标准未抛补利率平价（UIP）在这些恐慌时期并不成立。基于上述结果，央行应超越线性利率目标，转向积极的预期引导与宏观稳定政策行动，并采取逆周期汇率缓冲措施，以恢复市场出清机制。流动性危机无法仅通过央行增加或减少广义货币供给来解决。政策制定者若想恢复正常的市场出清速度，必须坚决终结不确定性阴云。这需要财政与货币政策通过高度透明的预期引导与长期视野进行协调，这将有助于稳定市场，从而将预防性囤积弹性降至基线水平。JEL分类：E41, C23, E52, F41, D81。

analysis.chinese_title: 宏观经济不确定性阈值下的货币需求与流动性惯性：来自机器学习和非线性DSGE分析的G7经济体证据
analysis.summary: 本文针对G7经济体（2000-2025年），采用机器学习-截面增强面板平滑转换回归（ML-CS-PSTR）模型和三阶扰动非线性动态随机一般均衡（DSGE）模型，研究货币需求的非线性特征。通过贝叶斯加性回归树（BART）内生识别系统性风险阈值：当经济政策不确定性与金融危机综合指数超过1.84个标准差时，经济进入高预防性储蓄（68.9%），流动性调整速度从28.5%骤降至9.2%，产生流动性惯性。非线性DSGE方差分解表明，政策不确定性冲击长期主导货币需求波动，远超传统货币政策反应。因子增强协整和异质性因果检验显示，阈值危机期间金融一体化与货币波动存在双向因果链，标准泰勒规则和未抛补利率平价失效。结论建议央行采用激进前瞻指引、宏观稳定政策和逆周期汇率缓冲以恢复市场出清。
innovations: 首次将机器学习（BART）与截面增强面板平滑转换回归（CS-PSTR）结合，内生识别宏观经济不确定性阈值。
构建包含经济政策不确定性冲击、金融一体化和汇率波动的非线性DSGE模型，并采用三阶扰动求解以捕捉预防性行为。
发现流动性惯性现象：阈值之上货币需求调整速度从28.5%降至9.2%，且政策不确定性冲击长期主导货币需求波动。
实证表明标准未抛补利率平价在危机阈值期间失效，金融一体化与汇率波动形成双向因果链。
analysis.methodology: 采用两阶段混合方法：第一阶段使用贝叶斯加性回归树（BART）进行变量选择和阈值识别；第二阶段采用截面增强面板平滑转换回归（CS-PSTR）估计非线性效应，并通过共同相关效应（CCE）控制截面依赖。同时构建开放经济非线性DSGE模型，包含家庭预防性货币需求、金融摩擦、随机波动率，并使用三阶扰动求解。估计采用贝叶斯MCMC。
key_results: BART识别出系统性风险阈值：经济政策不确定性与金融危机综合指数超过1.84个标准差。
阈值之下市场均值回归效率为28.5%/季度；阈值之上预防性储蓄达68.9%，流动性调整速度降至9.2%。
非线性DSGE方差分解显示政策不确定性冲击长期主导货币需求波动。
因子增强协整和异质性因果检验表明阈值危机期间金融一体化与汇率波动存在双向因果。
标准未抛补利率平价在恐慌期间不成立。
tech_stack: 截面增强面板平滑转换回归（CS-PSTR）
贝叶斯马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）
strengths: 创新性地融合机器学习与结构计量模型，内生识别阈值，避免主观设定。
非线性DSGE模型提供微观基础，三阶扰动准确捕捉预防性行为。
全面考虑截面依赖和全球溢出效应，方法严谨。
政策含义明确，为央行应对流动性危机提供具体建议。
limitations: 样本仅覆盖G7经济体，结论向新兴市场推广需谨慎。
DSGE模型参数估计依赖先验设定，可能影响结果稳健性。
BART阈值识别结果可能受数据频率和样本期影响。
未讨论货币需求的其他潜在决定因素（如制度质量、金融创新）。

title: Impact de la dollarisation sur la transmission de la Politique Monétaire en République Démocratique du Congo : une analyse économétrique par le modèle VECM sur la période 2001 à 2025
abstract: Résumé Cette étude analyse l'impact de la dollarisation sur la transmission de la politique monétaire en République Démocratique du Congo (RDC) sur la période 2001-2025. L'objectif est d'évaluer dans quelle mesure la forte utilisation du dollar américain affecte l'efficacité des principaux canaux de transmission de la politique monétaire de la Banque Centrale du Congo (BCC). La méthodologie repose sur une approche économétrique des séries temporelles utilisant les tests de stationnarité d'Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF), le test de cointégration de Johansen, le modèle à correction d'erreur vectoriel (VECM) ainsi que les tests de causalité de Granger. Les résultats montrent que l'ordre optimal du modèle VAR est de quatre retards selon les critères AIC, HQIC et SBIC. Les tests de Johansen mettent en évidence l'existence d'au moins une relation de cointégration entre les variables. Les estimations du VECM indiquent notamment un coefficient de détermination de 98,95 % pour l'équation de la dollarisation (R² = 0,9895) et de 99,98 % pour le crédit au secteur privé (R² = 0,9998). Les résultats de long terme révèlent que la dollarisation influence significativement l'inflation (β = −5,484 ; p < 0,001), tandis que le taux directeur (β = 0,936 ; p = 0,006), le taux de change (β = 0,062 ; p = 0,026) et le crédit au secteur privé (β = 17,370 ; p = 0,001) exercent des effets positifs et significatifs. Les tests de causalité de Granger confirment que le taux directeur, le taux de change, la masse monétaire et le crédit bancaire influencent significativement la dollarisation. L'étude conclut que la forte dollarisation réduit l'efficacité des mécanismes de transmission de la politique monétaire en RDC et souligne la nécessité d'accélérer les politiques de dédollarisation afin de renforcer la crédibilité de la politique monétaire. Mots-clés : Dollarisation ; Politique monétaire ; Inflation ; VECM ; Cointégration ; Banque Centrale du Congo ; RDC. Abstract This study examines the impact of dollarization on the transmission of monetary policy in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) over the period 2001–2025. The main objective is to assess how the widespread use of the US dollar affects the effectiveness of the monetary policy transmission mechanisms implemented by the Central Bank of the Congo. The study employs a time-series econometric approach based on the Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root test, Johansen cointegration test, Vector Error Correction Model (VECM), and Granger causality tests. The empirical findings indicate that the optimal VAR lag length is four according to the AIC, HQIC, and SBIC criteria. Johansen's test confirms the existence of at least one long-run cointegration relationship among the variables. The VECM estimates show high explanatory power, with an R² of 0.9895 for the dollarization equation and 0.9998 for private sector credit. Long-run estimates reveal that dollarization significantly affects inflation (β = −5.484, p < 0.001), while the policy interest rate (β = 0.936, p = 0.006), exchange rate (β = 0.062, p = 0.026), and private sector credit (β = 17.370, p = 0.001) exert positive and statistically significant effects. Granger causality tests further indicate that the policy rate, exchange rate, money supply, and private sector credit significantly influence dollarization. The findings suggest that high dollarization weakens the effectiveness of monetary policy transmission in the DRC and emphasize the need to strengthen dedollarization policies to improve monetary policy credibility and macroeconomic stability. Keywords: Dollarization; Monetary Policy; Inflation; VECM; Cointegration; Central Bank of the Congo; Democratic Republic of the Congo.

tldr: 该研究通过VECM模型分析2001-2025年数据，发现刚果民主共和国的高美元化显著削弱了货币政策传导效率，并建议加速去美元化政策以增强货币政策可信度。
abstract_cn: 本研究分析了2001-2025年期间美元化对刚果民主共和国（RDC）货币政策传导的影响，旨在评估美元广泛使用在多大程度上影响了刚果中央银行（BCC）主要货币政策传导渠道的有效性。研究方法采用时间序列计量经济学方法，包括增广迪基-富勒（ADF）平稳性检验、约翰森（Johansen）协整检验、向量误差修正模型（VECM）以及格兰杰（Granger）因果关系检验。结果表明，根据AIC、HQIC和SBIC准则，最优VAR模型滞后阶数为四阶。约翰森检验显示变量间至少存在一个协整关系。VECM估计结果尤其表明，美元化方程的决定系数为98.95%（R² = 0.9895），私营部门信贷方程的决定系数为99.98%（R² = 0.9998）。长期结果显示，美元化对通货膨胀具有显著影响（β = −5.484；p < 0.001），而政策利率（β = 0.936；p = 0.006）、汇率（β = 0.062；p = 0.026）和私营部门信贷（β = 17.370；p = 0.001）则产生显著的正向效应。格兰杰因果关系检验证实，政策利率、汇率、货币供应量和银行信贷对美元化具有显著影响。研究得出结论：高度美元化削弱了刚果民主共和国货币政策传导机制的有效性，并强调有必要加快去美元化政策，以增强货币政策的可信度。

analysis.chinese_title: 美元化对刚果民主共和国货币政策传导的影响：基于2001-2025年VECM模型的计量分析
analysis.summary: 本研究分析了2001-2025年期间美元化对刚果民主共和国货币政策传导的影响。采用时间序列计量方法，包括ADF单位根检验、Johansen协整检验、向量误差修正模型（VECM）和Granger因果检验。结果显示，最优滞后阶数为4，存在至少一个协整关系。VECM估计表明，美元化方程R²为0.9895，私人部门信贷方程R²为0.9998。长期关系显示，美元化显著影响通胀（β=-5.484, p<0.001），而政策利率（β=0.936, p=0.006）、汇率（β=0.062, p=0.026）和私人部门信贷（β=17.370, p=0.001）具有正向显著效应。Granger因果检验证实，政策利率、汇率、货币供应量和私人部门信贷显著影响美元化。结论认为，高美元化削弱了货币政策传导的有效性，需加强去美元化政策。
innovations: 首次使用VECM模型系统分析刚果民主共和国美元化对货币政策传导的影响，覆盖2001-2025年长期数据。
通过Johansen协整检验确认了美元化、通胀、利率、汇率、货币供应量和信贷之间的长期均衡关系。
利用Granger因果检验揭示了政策利率、汇率、货币供应量和信贷对美元化的单向因果关系。
提供了高R²值（美元化方程0.9895，信贷方程0.9998），表明模型解释力强。
analysis.methodology: 采用定量时间序列计量方法，包括：ADF单位根检验、Phillips-Perron检验、Johansen协整检验、向量误差修正模型（VECM）、Granger因果检验、脉冲响应函数分析。数据为年度数据，来源为刚果中央银行、国际货币基金组织和世界银行。模型设定以通胀为因变量，美元化、政策利率、汇率、货币供应量和私人部门信贷为自变量。
key_results: 最优VAR滞后阶数为4（AIC、HQIC、SBIC一致选择）。
Johansen迹检验表明存在至少一个协整关系（迹统计量15.3149，5%临界值15.41）。
VECM估计：美元化方程R²=0.9895，私人部门信贷方程R²=0.9998。
Granger因果检验：政策利率、汇率、货币供应量和私人部门信贷显著影响美元化（p<0.05）。
tech_stack: Johansen 协整检验（迹统计量）
strengths: 使用VECM模型同时捕捉短期动态和长期均衡关系，适合分析协整时间序列。
数据覆盖25年，提供了长期视角。
模型拟合优度高（R²接近1），解释力强。
Granger因果检验提供了变量间因果方向的证据。
limitations: 使用年度数据，观测值数量有限，可能影响估计精度。
未纳入制度变量（如央行可信度、预期、政治冲击）。
结果仅适用于刚果民主共和国，外推需谨慎。
部分变量（如通胀方程）的R²较低（0.3582），模型对通胀的解释力有限。

title: Using the GARCH model to measure the dual impact of money supply (M2) on returns and volatility risk in the Vietnamese stock market
abstract: The paper examines the dual impact of monetary policy, specifically money supply (M2), on the returns and volatility risk in the Vietnamese stock market over the period 2010-2025. The EGARCH-X model with Student-t distribution is employed to manage volatility clustering and the fat-tailed distribution of financial time series. The empirical results represent two critical findings. First, the expansion of money supply has a positive and significant impact on the VN-Index, highlighting the leading role of cash flow in asset valuation; this finding is consistent with the Portfolio Balance Theory. Secondly, the paper shows evidence that money supply (M2) is associated with a reduction in market volatility risk within the sample period, contradicting the view that liquidity expansion tends to cause short-term instability. Furthermore, the results indicate that the leverage effect is not statistically significant, suggesting that the market reacts relatively symmetrically to positive and negative information during this period. These findings provide important policy implications for the State Bank of Vietnam in managing monetary policy, contributing to maintaining the stability of the financial market.

tldr: 该论文使用EGARCH-X模型研究越南货币供应量（M2）对股市回报和波动风险的双重影响，发现M2扩张正向影响回报并降低波动风险，且杠杆效应不显著。
abstract_cn: 本文研究了2010-2025年期间货币政策（特别是货币供应量M2）对越南股票市场收益率与波动风险的双重影响。采用基于学生t分布的EGARCH-X模型来处理金融时间序列的波动聚集性和厚尾分布特征。实证结果揭示了两项关键发现：第一，货币供应量的扩张对VN-Index具有显著正向影响，凸显了现金流在资产定价中的主导作用，这一发现与资产组合平衡理论（Portfolio Balance Theory）一致；第二，研究表明在样本期内货币供应量（M2）与市场波动风险降低存在关联，这与流动性扩张易引发短期不稳定的观点相悖。此外，结果还显示杠杆效应在统计上不显著，表明该时期市场对正负信息的反应相对对称。这些发现为越南国家银行（State Bank of Vietnam）管理货币政策、维护金融市场稳定提供了重要的政策启示。

title: Friend, Not Foe? Monetary Policy and Energy Prices
abstract: We empirically show that a central bank’s ability to affect global energy prices crucially alters monetary policy transmission. We first provide novel evidence that euro area monetary policy significantly affects energy prices. Employing a Lucas critique-robust counterfactual framework, we find that this ability strengthens and accelerates transmission to inflation and substantially alleviates the inflation-output trade-off. We further show that this ability materially shapes the mandate-optimal policy response to an energy supply shock: the optimal response implies a smaller interest rate increase and a more favorable inflation-output allocation than in a scenario where energy prices are unaffected by monetary policy.

tldr: 论文实证发现欧元区货币政策显著影响全球能源价格，且这种能力增强了货币政策向通胀的传导，改善了通胀-产出权衡，并影响了最优政策应对能源供给冲击的方式。
abstract_cn: 我们通过实证研究表明，中央银行影响全球能源价格的能力会显著改变货币政策的传导机制。我们首先提供了新的证据，证明欧元区货币政策对能源价格具有显著影响。采用一个经卢卡斯批判检验的反事实分析框架，我们发现，这种能力能够增强并加速货币政策向通胀的传导，同时显著缓解通胀与产出之间的权衡关系。我们进一步证明，这种能力在很大程度上塑造了应对能源供给冲击时的最优政策响应：与能源价格不受货币政策影响的情景相比，最优响应意味着更小的利率上调幅度以及更有利的通胀-产出配置。

title: Commercial activities of early ‘central banks’, geographic expansion, and banking correspondents: Italy, 1861–1936
abstract: Recent research has put the business activities of late 19th-mid-20th-century ‘central banks’ back at the core of the analysis. This paper contributes to the debate on the Italian case, focusing on the period between the country’s Unification in 1861 and the establishment of a proper central bank in 1936. The paper demonstrates that the country’s main banks of issue (the Banca Nazionale until 1893 and the Banca d’Italia thereafter) developed a highly cost-effective strategy of geographical expansion based on a network of correspondents. Corporate offices were also established, primarily due to institutional pressure, specific contingencies, or complementarity with the functions of correspondent banks. The result was the establishment of a national payment system and a profitable expansion of these institutions, which, in turn, helped foster a stronger commitment to central banking duties and responsibilities.

tldr: 本文研究了1861-1936年意大利早期中央银行如何通过建立代理行网络实现低成本地理扩张，从而促进全国支付系统建立并强化其中央银行职责。
abstract_cn: 近期研究将19世纪末至20世纪中叶“中央银行”的商业活动重新置于分析核心。本文聚焦于意大利1861年统一至1936年正式中央银行建立之间的时期，为该议题的讨论做出贡献。研究表明，该国的主要发钞银行（1893年前的Banca Nazionale及此后的Banca d’Italia）基于代理行网络，发展出极具成本效益的地理扩张策略。总行办事处的设立则主要源于制度压力、特定偶发事件或与代理行职能的互补性。其结果是建立了全国支付体系，并实现了这些机构的盈利性扩张，进而有助于强化其对中央银行职责与义务的履行承诺。

title: Structural Vulnerabilities of Peripheral Economies under Dollar Hegemony: External Financial Containment, Endogenous Livelihood Supply Autonomy and Macroeconomic Governance Distortion — A Multi-Case Comparative Analysis Based on the Philippines (2022–2024)
abstract: Abstract Against the backdrop of global multipolarization, dollar-dominated cross-border financial systems have enabled Western powers to deploy two differentiated unilateral containment tools: the freezing of sovereign foreign exchange reserves and the judicial seizure of overseas private assets belonging to political elites. Existing scholarship tends to compartmentalize research on geopolitical alliances, imported inflation, dollar sanctions, currency stability and people-centered livelihood security, lacking an integrated analytical chain linking long-term institutional structural defects, superimposed external financial restraints, distorted domestic policy arrangements, erosion of physical monetary anchors, and persistent divergence between macroeconomic indicators and grassroots livelihood perceptions. This paper constructs a unified theoretical framework integrating Dependency Theory, layered physical monetary anchor theory, monetary sovereignty theory, resource curse theory, latecomer advantage theory and the people-centered sustainable development paradigm. It strictly distinguishes benign comparative advantage trade division from structural over-reliance on survival necessities, formal institutional texts from defective enforcement mechanisms, and short-term foreign exchange gains from high-end manufacturing versus long-term livelihood-based physical output support. Taking the Philippines from 2022 to 2024 as the core research case, this study relies on verifiable official sequential data released by the Philippine Statistics Authority, ADB, FAO and IMF to conduct objective mechanism analysis without speculating on the subjective intentions or future political fate of policymakers. Gradient comparative cases are introduced, including Somalias systemic monetary collapse and Sri Lankas sovereign debt crisis as negative crisis samples, Russias autonomous de-dollarization practice as a positive breakthrough sample, Vietnam and Indonesias moderate diversified reform as transitional balanced samples, and Japan-South Korea high-endmanufacturing economies as transitional risk samples. The research quantifies risk thresholds for over-reliance on essential livelihood goods and sorts out the evolutionary logic of U.S. proxy containment strategies during the Cold War and the contemporary era. The study concludes that long-term institutional flaws in industry, food security, statistical supervision, diplomacy and monetary governance form the fundamental structural root of governance distortion, while overseas asset judicial control and global imported inflation merely act as risk amplifiers. The stable purchasing power of a countrys currency is fundamentally supported by domestically self-produced food, energy and other livelihood necessities rather than short-term foreign exchange dividends generated by high-tech exports. Constrained by technological bottlenecks and latecomer catch-up effects, the profit advantages of high-end industries are only temporary buffers and cannot resolve long-term structural fragility caused by external supply dependence. For most developing peripheral economies, improving institutional systems to guarantee independent supply of core livelihood necessities is a structural path to weaken unilateral external restraints and implement people-centered sustainable development. Keywords Dollar Financial Hegemony; Physical Monetary Anchor; Monetary Sovereignty; Dependency Theory; Autonomy of Basic Livelihood Supplies; Peripheral Economies; Governance Distortion

tldr: 论文构建统一理论框架，以菲律宾2022-2024年为核心案例，分析外围经济体在美元霸权下因制度缺陷导致对外部生存必需品依赖，进而引发宏观经济治理扭曲，强调国内自主生产生存必需品是货币购买力的根本支撑。
abstract_cn: 在全球多极化背景下，以美元为主导的跨境金融体系使西方大国得以部署两种差异化的单边遏制工具：冻结主权外汇储备以及对政治精英的海外私人资产实施司法扣押。现有学术研究倾向于将地缘政治联盟、输入型通胀、美元制裁、货币稳定与以人民为中心的民生保障等议题分门别类地加以探讨，缺乏一条能够将长期制度性结构缺陷、叠加的外部金融约束、扭曲的国内政策安排、实物货币锚的侵蚀以及宏观经济指标与基层民生感知之间的持续背离串联起来的统一分析链条。本文构建了一个整合依附理论、分层实物货币锚理论、货币主权理论、资源诅咒理论、后发优势理论以及以人民为中心的可持续发展范式的统一理论框架，严格区分了良性比较优势贸易分工与对生存必需品的结构性过度依赖、正式制度文本与有缺陷的执行机制、高端制造业带来的短期外汇收益与长期基于民生的实物产出支撑。本研究以2022年至2024年的菲律宾为核心研究案例，依赖菲律宾统计局、亚洲开发银行、联合国粮农组织及国际货币基金组织发布的可验证官方时序数据，进行客观的机制分析，而不对政策制定者的主观意图或未来政治命运进行推测。研究引入了梯度比较案例，包括索马里的系统性货币崩溃和斯里兰卡的主权债务危机作为负面危机样本，俄罗斯的自主去美元化实践作为正面突破样本，越南和印度尼西亚的温和多元化改革作为过渡性平衡样本，以及日韩高端制造经济体作为过渡性风险样本。研究量化了对基本民生必需品过度依赖的风险阈值，并梳理了冷战时期与当代美国代理人遏制策略的演进逻辑。研究结论表明，产业、粮食安全、统计监管、外交及货币治理领域的长期制度缺陷构成了治理扭曲的根本结构性根源，而海外资产司法控制与全球输入型通胀仅充当风险放大器。一国货币的稳定购买力从根本上依赖于国内自主生产的粮食、能源及其他民生必需品，而非高科技出口所产生的短期外汇红利。受技术瓶颈与后发追赶效应的制约，高端产业的利润优势仅为暂时缓冲，无法化解由外部供给依赖所导致的长期结构性脆弱。对于大多数发展中边缘经济体而言，完善制度体系以保障核心民生必需品的自主供给，是削弱外部单边遏制、落实以人民为中心的可持续发展的结构性路径。关键词：美元金融霸权；实物货币锚；货币主权；依附理论；基本民生供给自主权；边缘经济体；治理扭曲

title: Deterministic Cosmic Architecture: Linking Global Dark Matter and Local Star Formation through Carrollian Freezing
abstract: We introduce a multi-scale geometric framework that patches General Relativity's classical breakdown threshold at the singularity limit without invoking exotic extensions, hidden dimensions, or undiscovered subatomic fields. Guided by the principles of the Belinski-Khalatnikov-Lifshitz (BKL) conjecture, we show that an extreme volumetric contraction inside collapsing primordial masses drives an instantaneous Carrollian phase transition (where the local speed of light approaches zero) at the end of inflation. This metric degeneracy enforces a strict coordinate velocity clamp, regularizing curvature invariants while preserving a stable, non-radiating, macroscopically isolated gravitational mass footprint. Distributed as a global, collisionless background matrix spaced at a sparse mean interval of roughly 24 AU, these remnants naturally account for 100% of the cosmic Cold Dark Matter budget, safely evading optical micro-lensing survey limits. Crucially, our framework derives the cosmic value of the speed of light not as an arbitrary constant, but as a rigid boundary condition fine-tuned to act as a geometric circuit breaker at the Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff (TOV) nuclear failure limit. On galactic scales, localized remnant overdensities clustered at a tight 215-meter separation profile resolve the Core-Cusp problem and form an extended, zero-feedback gravitational sponge. The resulting quadratic accretion cascade suppresses the localized radiation pressure gradient, providing a direct geometric solution to the anomalous "X-ray Weakness" and accelerated mass assembly observed across high-redshift JWST Little Red Dot (LRD) galaxies. Scaled down to stellar systems, the framework dictates that single remnants drop the local Jeans mass to zero, driving the binary mass divergence between main-sequence stars and core-accretion gas giants, matching active helioseismology data tracking low-frequency gravity modes. On a global cosmic scale, we extend this framework to show that a total universal collapse triggers an absolute geometric pressure gradient divergence at the Planck boundary, providing a micro-physical mechanism for a cyclic Big Bounce. We conclude with clear proposals for experimental falsifiability via LISA orbital dephasing and Roman Space Telescope weak-lensing micro-flecking m aps.

tldr: 该论文提出一个基于广义相对论和BKL猜想的宇宙学框架，通过卡洛里冻结机制解释暗物质、星系形成和宇宙循环，与经济学无关。
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种多尺度几何框架，该框架在不借助奇异扩展、隐藏维度或未发现亚原子场的情况下，修补了广义相对论在奇点极限处的经典崩溃阈值。在别林斯基-哈拉特尼科夫-利夫希茨（BKL）猜想的原理指导下，我们表明，在暴胀末期，坍缩原初质量内部的极端体积收缩会引发瞬时的卡罗尔相变（此时局部光速趋近于零）。这种度规退化强制施加了严格的坐标速度钳制，正则化了曲率不变量，同时保留了一个稳定、无辐射、宏观隔离的引力质量印记。这些残余物以稀疏的平均间隔约24天文单位分布，形成一个全局、无碰撞的背景矩阵，自然解释了100%的宇宙冷暗物质预算，并安全避开了光学微引力透镜巡天的限制。至关重要的是，我们的框架推导出光速的宇宙值并非任意常数，而是一个刚性边界条件，被精细调节以在托尔曼-奥本海默-沃尔科夫（TOV）核失效极限处充当几何断路器。在星系尺度上，局部残余物以紧密的215米间隔分布形成过密度，解决了核心-尖点问题，并构成一个扩展的、零反馈的引力海绵。由此产生的二次吸积级联抑制了局部辐射压力梯度，为在高红移詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）小红点（LRD）星系中观测到的反常“X射线弱”和加速质量聚集提供了直接的几何解释。缩小到恒星系统，该框架表明单个残余物将局部金斯质量降至零，导致主序星与核吸积气态巨行星之间的双星质量发散，这与追踪低频引力模式的活跃日震学数据相符。在全球宇宙尺度上，我们扩展了这一框架，表明一次总宇宙坍缩会在普朗克边界处引发绝对的几何压力梯度发散，为循环大反弹提供了微观物理机制。最后，我们提出了通过激光干涉仪空间天线（LISA）轨道失相和罗曼空间望远镜弱引力透镜微斑图进行实验可证伪性的明确方案。

title: Constraints on Residential Housing Development in the Greater Accra Region of Ghana
abstract: Quality housing is the engine of growth for every country due to the numerous benefits it provides for economic and social development. Residential housing is of no exception. Adequate quality residential housing development provision is vital. However, residential developers and building contractors in the developing countries such as Ghana usually meet constraints in the process of executing residential housing projects. This study was designed and structured purposely to identify such constraints as well as establishing pragmatic measures which can be adopted to address or minimize such constraints. To begin with, researchers took time to conduct review on the various kinds of residential developers currently existing and operating in Ghana’s real estate industry, identify constraints they face and measures to adopt in addressing the identified constraints. Thereafter, a quantitative approach was adopted where a survey of questionnaires were distributed to some selected real estate developers, building contractors and building project managers who are directly involved in residential housing development projects in Greater Accra Region of Ghana through referrals in collecting primary data. Out of the 160 questionnaires distributed, 152 were received which represented 95% response rate. The gathered data were screened and analysed by using SPSS software. It was discovered through this research study that the unstable inflation rate, high interest rate, land acquisition challenges, delay of development permit approval and high cost of land servicing are the main constraints impeding residential housing development. The study further suggests that the Government of Ghana should be advised to develop economic policies that can stabilize inflation, lower interest rate, speed up permit approvals whiles developers also take initiative to form PPPs with the key role players in providing cost effective land servicing exercises and conducting due diligence when acquiring lands for residential housing development projects.

tldr: 该论文识别了加纳大阿克拉地区住宅开发的主要约束，包括高通胀率、高利率、土地获取困难等，并建议政府制定稳定通胀和降低利率的政策。
abstract_cn: 优质住房是每个国家经济增长的引擎，因为它为经济和社会发展带来了诸多益处。住宅建设也不例外。提供充足的优质住宅开发至关重要。然而，在加纳等发展中国家，住宅开发商和建筑承包商在执行住宅项目时通常会遇到制约因素。本研究旨在识别这些制约因素，并提出可行的措施以解决或减少这些制约。首先，研究人员花费时间对加纳房地产行业中现有运营的各类住宅开发商进行了综述，识别了他们面临的制约因素以及应对这些制约的措施。随后，采用定量研究方法，通过推荐方式向加纳大阿克拉地区直接参与住宅开发项目的部分房地产开发商、建筑承包商和建筑项目经理发放了调查问卷，以收集一手数据。在发放的160份问卷中，回收了152份，回复率为95%。收集到的数据使用SPSS软件进行筛选和分析。研究发现，不稳定的通货膨胀率、高利率、土地获取困难、开发许可证审批延迟以及土地开发成本高昂是阻碍住宅开发的主要制约因素。研究进一步建议，应建议加纳政府制定能够稳定通胀、降低利率、加快许可证审批的经济政策，同时开发商也应主动与关键角色方建立公私合作伙伴关系（PPP），以提供成本效益高的土地开发服务，并在为住宅开发项目获取土地时进行尽职调查。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Ownership structure, financial leverage, and company performance; A study of companies on Nigeria Stock Exchange
abstract: This study analyzed the effect of ownership structure, financial leverage on company performance in Nigeria. In particular, the study examines the managerial ownership, institutional ownership, foreign ownership and the financial leverage on the performance of selected listed manufacturing companies in Nigeria using return on assets (ROA) as a proxy measure of performance. The agency theory was used as the major theory used to anchor the study, while the trade-off theory and pecking order theory provided supplementary explanations of the financing decisions of the firm and the capital structure. The study is on ex post facto research design as historical secondary data was used from published annual reports of five selected listed manufacturing companies during 2019-2025. The study employed panel data of 35 firm-years. The analysis has been carried out by descriptive statistics, correlation analysis, variance inflation factor, heteroskedasticity test, Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root test and pooled Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) regression analysis. Managerial ownership positively and statistically significantly impacted the performance of the firm and it was concluded that an increase in managerial ownership resulted in a positive increase in firm performance as it affected the interests of the manager and the owner in a better way. The negative relationship between financial leverage and performance implies that over-increasing debt financing has a negative and statistically significant effect on firm performance as it would increase financing costs and financial risk, which would negatively impact profitability. Institutional ownership and foreign ownership, on ROA, however, had positive but insignificant effects. Overall regression model was statistically significant and accounted for about 63.15% of the variations in the firm's performance. After studying it, it is concluded that managerial ownership improves financial performance, but the high financial leverage reduces profitability. Hence, the study suggests that manufacturing companies should encourage managerial equity participation, adopt optimal debt ratio, enhance the monitoring function of institutional investors, and foster good foreign investors participation in corporate governance. Keywords: Ownership, Structure, Return, Foreign, Firms, Nigeria.

tldr: 该论文研究了尼日利亚制造公司的所有权结构和财务杠杆对公司绩效（ROA）的影响，发现管理层所有权正向影响绩效，而高财务杠杆负向影响绩效。
abstract_cn: 本研究分析了尼日利亚公司所有权结构、财务杠杆对公司绩效的影响。具体而言，研究以资产收益率（ROA）作为绩效的代理指标，考察了管理层所有权、机构所有权、外资所有权及财务杠杆对尼日利亚部分上市制造公司绩效的影响。代理理论作为支撑本研究的主要理论，而权衡理论与优序融资理论则对公司融资决策及资本结构提供了补充性解释。本研究采用事后回溯研究设计，使用了2019-2025年间五家选定上市制造公司已公布年报中的历史二手数据，共涉及35个公司-年度的面板数据。分析通过描述性统计、相关性分析、方差膨胀因子检验、异方差性检验、增广迪基-富勒（ADF）单位根检验及混合普通最小二乘法（OLS）回归分析完成。管理层所有权对公司绩效具有正向且统计显著的影响，研究结论认为管理层所有权的增加会正向提升公司绩效，因其能更好地协调管理层与所有者之间的利益关系。财务杠杆与绩效之间的负向关系表明，过度增加债务融资会对公司绩效产生负向且统计显著的影响，因为这会提高融资成本与财务风险，进而对盈利能力产生负面影响。然而，机构所有权与外资所有权对ROA的影响虽为正向但不显著。整体回归模型具有统计显著性，可解释公司绩效约63.15%的变异。经研究得出结论：管理层所有权能改善财务绩效，但高财务杠杆会降低盈利能力。因此，本研究建议制造公司应鼓励管理层持股、采用最优负债比率、强化机构投资者的监督职能，并促进优质外资参与公司治理。关键词：所有权，结构，回报，外资，公司，尼日利亚。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Expectation as Criterion: A Cross-Modal Real-Time Calibration Mechanism of Human Sensory Judgment
abstract: Author Information Author: Baichen Yi Preprint V1.0 Affiliation: Independent Researcher, Xi'an, Shaanxi, 710000, China ORCID: 0009-0008-6242-7743 Corresponding Author: Baichen Yi Email:ybcbenxin@163.com Conflict of Interest Statement: The author declares that there are no conflicts of interest related to this work. Copyright and License This preprint is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0), permitting open sharing and redistribution worldwide under the conditions of proper attribution, non-commercial use, and no derivative works. Special Authorization Statement: The author expressly authorizes any individual or institution to translate this article, in whole or in part, into other languages. Translated versions must preserve the core logic of the original text and cite the original source and author information. The full license text is available at: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/ Preprint Statement This article is a preprint that has not undergone peer review. It proposes testable structural hypotheses based on cross-modal phenomenological induction and reinterpretation of existing literature. All falsification conditions and operationalization criteria are presented in §6. Abstract Background: The MFY three-variable steady-state model has achieved cross-domain validation across multiple fields including psychology, economics, motor skill acquisition, AI alignment, mammalian behavior, and placebo effects. The proposition that "expectation Y is the sole legitimate intervention target of the system" has been supported by multiple independent lines of evidence. However, these validations have focused on behavioral and decision-making levels, leaving untouched a more fundamental question: where do the criteria of subjective experience in the human sensory system itself — taste, vision, olfaction, audition, somatosensation, spatial distance perception, and proprioception — come from? Method: Starting from six cross-modal sensory calibration phenomena and integrating the Y variable definition and M₁→F₁→Y→F₂→M₂ transmission structure of the MFY framework, this article proposes and argues for a unified proposition: the subjective judgment criteria of all sensory modalities are real-time calibrated by expectation Y; neural transmission serves as the physical carrier of signals, while Y is the determinant of criteria. This work is fully compatible with existing findings in sensory neuroscience regarding signal transmission mechanisms, and addresses a long-standing question that has never been directly answered: where does the "judgment criterion" come from after signals arrive, and how does it change? Results: Drawing on six sensory modalities — taste/olfaction (flavor adaptation and cross-cultural dietary experience reversal), somatosensation/pain (tactile adaptation and placebo/nocebo effects), audition (auditory adaptation and soundscape calibration), spatial distance perception (distance judgment calibration in driving and martial arts), proprioception (body schema calibration in motor skill acquisition), and vision (Y recalibration under irreversible physical changes) — this article identifies six unified characteristics of sensory system Y calibration, and forms cross-validation with the Y/M dual-layer defense mechanism in Paper 1 §4.6, the expectation lock-in theory in Paper 8, and the signal-source dependence of the inflation coefficient in Paper 10. Conclusion: "Y is the criterion itself" is not a local regularity confined to a single domain, but a unified mechanism covering the full hierarchy from sensation to cognition to behavior. The real-time calibration of Y in the sensory system provides the most fundamental and universal empirical evidence for the MFY framework, elevating "expectation-driven" from a psychological hypothesis to a testable proposition about the foundational structure of the sensory-cognitive system. Keywords: sensory adaptation; expectation; judgment criterion; reference point; cross-modal perception; placebo effect; habituation; proprioception; body schema; phantom limb pain; obsessive-compulsive disorder; trust; real-time calibration; MFY three-variable model

tldr: 该论文提出期望Y是跨模态感官判断标准的实时校准机制，并通过六种感官模态的证据支持这一统一命题。

**作者信息**

预印本声明
本文为未经同行评审的预印本。它基于跨模态现象学归纳及对现有文献的重新诠释，提出了可检验的结构性假设。所有可证伪条件及可操作化标准均在§6中给出。

**摘要**
**背景：** MFY三变量稳态模型已在心理学、经济学、运动技能习得、AI对齐、哺乳动物行为及安慰剂效应等多个领域实现了跨域验证。“期望Y是系统唯一合法的干预目标”这一命题已获得多项独立证据支持。然而，这些验证集中于行为与决策层面，尚未触及一个更为根本的问题：人类感觉系统本身的主观体验标准——味觉、视觉、嗅觉、听觉、躯体感觉、空间距离感知及本体感觉——究竟源自何处？
**方法：** 本文从六种跨模态感觉校准现象出发，结合MFY框架的Y变量定义及M₁→F₁→Y→F₂→M₂传递结构，提出并论证了一个统一命题：所有感觉模态的主观判断标准均由期望Y进行实时校准；神经传递是信号的物理载体，而Y是标准的决定因素。本工作与感觉神经科学中关于信号传递机制的现有发现完全兼容，并解决了一个长期存在且从未被直接回答的问题：信号到达后，“判断标准”从何而来，又是如何变化的？
**结果：** 基于六种感觉模态——味觉/嗅觉（风味适应与跨文化饮食体验反转）、躯体感觉/疼痛（触觉适应与安慰剂/反安慰剂效应）、听觉（听觉适应与声景校准）、空间距离感知（驾驶与武术中的距离判断校准）、本体感觉（运动技能习得中的身体图式校准）以及视觉（不可逆物理变化下的Y重新校准）——本文识别出感觉系统Y校准的六个统一特征，并与论文1第4.6节中的Y/M双层防御机制、论文8中的期望锁定理论（expectation lock-in theory）以及论文10中的膨胀系数（inflation coefficient）信号源依赖性形成了交叉验证。
**结论：** “Y即标准本身”并非局限于单一领域的局部规律，而是一个涵盖从感觉、认知到行为完整层级的统一机制。Y在感觉系统中的实时校准，为MFY框架提供了最基础、最普适的经验证据，将“期望驱动”从一种心理学假说提升为关于感觉-认知系统基础结构的可检验命题。
**关键词：** 感觉适应；期望；判断标准；参照点；跨模态感知；安慰剂效应；习惯化；本体感觉；身体图式；幻肢痛；强迫症；信任；实时校准；MFY三变量模型

title: Sector Paper VII - Forced‑Emergence of Outer‑Shell Sparse‑Regime Dynamics in Uranus
abstract: SECTOR PAPER VII — FORCED‑EMERGENCE OF OUTER‑SHELL SPARSE‑REGIME DYNAMICS IN URANUS Sector Paper VII applies the sparse‑regime planetary framework of the Unified Information Substrate to the Uranus system, demonstrating that its anomalous outer‑shell structure, thermal deficit, and axial tilt are direct consequences of δI‑correlation‑gradient collapse in the outer‑shell domain. The paper shows that Uranus exhibits the same sparse‑regime inflation behaviour identified in Sector Paper VI, with correlation thinning producing an expanded, low‑density outer envelope and a suppressed internal heat flux. It further identifies a δI‑shock reconstruction event in Uranus’s past, revealing that the planet’s extreme axial tilt and internal stratification arise from a forced correlation‑gradient inversion rather than a classical impact scenario. The work establishes Uranus as the Solar System’s primary sparse‑regime validation object, demonstrating that its observed anomalies are structurally required by δI‑substrate dynamics. Sector Paper VII links planetary‑scale correlation behaviour to Solar System architecture, showing that sparse‑regime emergence, envelope inflation, and correlation‑gradient collapse occur in both exoplanetary systems and local bodies. As part of the multi‑volume UN Theory corpus, this paper connects directly to Sector Paper VI, which predicts sparse‑regime planets in TOI‑791, and Sector Papers VIII–IX, which formalise ultra‑global correlation closure and terminal‑state behaviour.

tldr: 该论文应用稀疏框架解释天王星异常的外壳结构、热亏损和轴倾角，认为这些现象源于δI相关梯度塌缩，而非经典撞击场景。
abstract_cn:
第七部门论文——天王星外壳稀疏态动力学的强制涌现  
第七部门论文将统一信息基底的稀疏态行星框架应用于天王星系统，论证了其异常的外壳结构、热亏损及轴向倾斜是外壳域中δI-相关梯度坍缩的直接结果。本文表明，天王星展现出与第六部门论文中识别的稀疏态膨胀行为相同的特征，相关稀疏化导致了膨胀、低密度的外壳包层以及被抑制的内部热通量。论文进一步识别了天王星历史上的一次δI-激波重构事件，揭示该行星极端的轴向倾斜与内部分层源于强制相关梯度反转，而非经典撞击情景。该研究将天王星确立为太阳系中主要的稀疏态验证对象，表明其观测到的异常在结构上由δI-基底动力学所要求。第七部门论文将行星尺度的相关行为与太阳系结构联系起来，表明稀疏态涌现、包层膨胀及相关梯度坍缩同时发生于系外行星系统与本地天体中。作为多卷本《UN理论》文集的一部分，本文直接衔接预测TOI-791中稀疏态行星的第六部门论文，以及形式化超全局相关闭合与终端态行为的第八至第九部门论文。

title: Resolution of a Cusp Singularity Without Blow-up: The RICIS-III Method
abstract: We present a resolution of the cusp singularity y² = x³ at the origin using the RICIS-III framework.Instead of classical blow-up, which introduces a projective line and increases local dimension, we apply the structural algebra of typed zeros 0_F := F × 0 (Axiom A10). The singularity is resolved via the structural relation 0_{(y²)} / 0_{(x³)} = y²/x³, which reduces to t² under the parametrization y ~ t x^{3/2} and the Law of Absolute Identity (L1). The result t² = x coincides with the classical strict transform, but is achieved without dimensional inflation, without projective extensions, and without loss of provenance. We also address a critical objection: in the quotient ring k[[x,y]]/(y²-x³), the elements y² and x³ are equal in value, yet their typed zeros remain structurally distinct because RICIS-III compares Expression Trees, not quotient values. This work demonstrates that RICIS-III can replace blow-up in algebraic geometry for a fundamental class of singularities.To check it you can test on the online calculator : https://remix-ricis-iii-501343051156.europe-west2.run.app

tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需爆破的尖点奇点解析方法，通过RICIS-III框架和类型零的代数结构实现，避免了维数膨胀和射影扩展。
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种利用RICIS-III框架在原点处解决尖点奇点y² = x³的方法。与经典爆破（引入一条射影线并增加局部维度）不同，我们应用了类型化零点0_F := F × 0的结构代数（公理A10）。该奇点通过结构关系0_{(y²)} / 0_{(x³)} = y²/x³得以解决，在参数化y ~ t x^{3/2}及绝对同一律（L1）下，该关系简化为t²。结果t² = x与经典严格变换一致，但无需维度膨胀、射影扩展，且不损失溯源。我们还回应了一个关键质疑：在商环k[[x,y]]/(y²-x³)中，元素y²与x³在数值上相等，但它们的类型化零点在结构上仍然不同，因为RICIS-III比较的是表达式树，而非商值。本研究表明，对于一类基本奇点，RICIS-III可以在代数几何中替代爆破。如需验证，可在线计算器上测试：https://remix-ricis-iii-501343051156.europe-west2.run.app

title: STAYING IN THE HOLODECK Proposal Paralysis, Nash Equilibria, and the Cost of Never Shipping
abstract: AI tools have dramatically lowered the cost of generating proposals, papers, and plans. This paper argues that the result is not creative acceleration — it is proposal inflation: a Nash equilibrium in which proposing is low-cost and high-status while shipping remains high-cost and failure-visible. We model this using a dual-attractor system in phase space, with the Thinker attractor trapping agents in simulation and the Thinkerer attractor forcing contact with reality through iterative shipping. Using Tasha Yar's refusal to leave the holodeck as a structural metaphor, we analyze the dopamine mechanics of AI-assisted proposal writing, the reinforcing role of peer review, and the delayed learning cost of deferred iteration. We contrast this with the 2023 WGA/SAG-AFTRA writers' strike as a rare instance of humans collectively refusing to stay in the sim. We propose a TRL-graded assessment rubric, a set of anti-paralysis workshop activities, diagnostics for Thinker-type cognitive profiles, and guardrails against gaming. Escape from the holodeck occurs only when shipping becomes cheaper than stalling — by structural design, not individual willpower.

tldr: 该论文研究AI辅助提案写作导致的提案膨胀和行动瘫痪问题，提出通过结构性设计使执行比停滞更便宜来逃离困境。
abstract_cn: 人工智能工具已大幅降低了生成提案、论文和计划的成本。本文认为，其结果并非创造性加速，而是提案膨胀：一种纳什均衡（Nash equilibrium）状态，在此状态下，提案成本低廉且地位崇高，而交付（shipping）成本高昂且失败可见。我们利用相空间（phase space）中的双吸引子系统对此建模，其中“思考者吸引子”（Thinker attractor）将智能体困于模拟之中，而“践行者吸引子”（Thinkerer attractor）则通过迭代交付迫使其与现实接触。以塔莎·亚尔（Tasha Yar）拒绝离开全息甲板（holodeck）作为结构性隐喻，我们分析了人工智能辅助提案写作的多巴胺机制、同行评审的强化作用，以及延迟迭代所带来的滞后学习成本。我们将此与2023年美国编剧工会（WGA）/美国电视与广播艺人联合会（SAG-AFTRA）编剧罢工进行对比，将其视为人类集体拒绝停留在模拟中的罕见案例。我们提出了一套基于技术成熟度等级（TRL）的评估标准、一组反瘫痪工作坊活动、针对思考者型认知特征的诊断方法，以及防止投机取巧的防护措施。唯有当交付比停滞成本更低时——这取决于结构性设计，而非个人意志——才能实现从全息甲板中的逃离。

title: <b>AN ANALYSIS OF THE LONG-TERM IMPACT OF EQUITY INVESTMENTS IN THE BANKING SECTOR WITH REFERENCE TO THE NIFTY BANK INDEX IN THE INDIAN STOCK MARKET</b>
abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive examination of the long-term impact of equity investments in India's banking sector, with particular reference to the Nifty Bank Index a sectoral benchmark that tracks the performance of the twelve most liquid and large-cap banking stocks listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) of India. The study covers the period from 2003 to 2024, encompassing multiple macroeconomic cycles, regulatory overhauls, and structural transformations in India's financial landscape.Using a multi-method approach that combines quantitative performance analysis, risk-adjusted return metrics, and qualitative policy evaluation, the paper investigates whether long-term equity investments in the banking sector have yielded superior risk-adjusted returns compared to the Nifty 50 benchmark. Our analysis demonstrates that the Nifty Bank Index has significantly outperformed the broader market over long investment horizons of ten years or more, delivering a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 17.2% between 2003 and 2024, compared to approximately 13.4% for the Nifty 50 during the same period. The paper further analyses the role of macroeconomic determinants including interest rate cycles, GDP growth, non-performing asset (NPA) ratios, credit growth, and fiscal policy in shaping long-term equity returns in the banking sector. The findings suggest that while the banking sector offers premium returns over extended horizons, investors must account for cyclicality, regulatory risk, and credit-quality deterioration, particularly during periods of economic stress such as the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, the 2016 demonetisation period, and the COVID-19 pandemic of 2020.The paper concludes with investment strategy recommendations and policy implications for institutional and retail investors seeking exposure to India's banking sector equity market.

tldr: 该论文分析了印度银行业股票（Nifty Bank指数）的长期投资表现，发现其2003-2024年间年化收益率约17.2%，优于Nifty 50的13.4%，并探讨了利率、信贷周期、财政政策等宏观因素对回报的影响。
abstract_cn: 本文全面考察了印度银行业股权投资的长期影响，特别参考了Nifty Bank Index（Nifty银行指数）——这一行业基准指数追踪了印度国家证券交易所（NSE）上市的十二只流动性最强且市值最大的银行股的表现。研究覆盖2003年至2024年期间，囊括了印度金融格局中的多个宏观经济周期、监管改革及结构性转型。通过采用结合定量绩效分析、风险调整后收益指标及定性政策评估的多方法路径，本文探究了相较于Nifty 50（Nifty 50指数）基准，银行业长期股权投资是否产生了更优的风险调整后收益。我们的分析表明，在十年或更长的长期投资期限内，Nifty银行指数显著跑赢大盘，2003年至2024年间实现了约17.2%的复合年增长率（CAGR），而同期Nifty 50指数的增长率约为13.4%。本文进一步分析了宏观经济决定因素（包括利率周期、GDP增长、不良资产（NPA）比率、信贷增长及财政政策）在塑造银行业长期股权收益中的作用。研究结果表明，尽管银行业在长期内提供了溢价回报，但投资者必须考虑周期性、监管风险及信贷质量恶化，尤其是在经济压力时期，例如2008年全球金融危机、2016年废钞令时期以及2020年COVID-19疫情。本文最后为寻求涉足印度银行业股权市场的机构及散户投资者提出了投资策略建议及政策启示。

title: THEORETICAL FOUNDATIONS OF THE IMPACT OF TAX POLICY ON ECONOMIC GROWTH
abstract: Tax policy is a key instrument of fiscal policy that affects investment, productivity, and long-term economic growth. This paper reviews the main theoretical approaches to the relationship between tax policy and economic growth, including classical, neoclassical, endogenous growth, optimal taxation, and public finance theories. It examines the channels through which taxation influences investment, labor supply, innovation, and productivity. The analysis concludes that the growth effects of taxation depend primarily on the design of the tax system and the efficient use of tax revenues rather than on the overall tax burden.

tldr: 本文综述了税收政策影响经济增长的理论基础，认为增长效应取决于税制设计和税收收入的有效使用，而非总体税负。
abstract_cn: 税收政策是财政政策的关键工具，影响着投资、生产率及长期经济增长。本文梳理了关于税收政策与经济增长关系的主要理论路径，包括古典理论、新古典理论、内生增长理论、最优税收理论及公共财政理论。研究考察了税收影响投资、劳动力供给、创新及生产率的传导渠道。分析得出结论：税收对增长的影响主要取决于税制设计及税收收入的使用效率，而非整体税负水平。

title: After the pandemic: Optimal fiscal policies for Slovenia
abstract: Abstract This paper derives implementable medium-run fiscal instrument paths for Slovenia, a small Euro-Area economy, in response to plausible transitory external shocks. We combine the macroeconometric model SLOPOL12 with a stochastic optimal-control framework in which the objective function is operationalized from a survey of Slovenian policy makers’ macroeconomic priorities. Approximately optimal policies are computed using the OPTCON algorithm in relation to a baseline forecast and alternative shock scenarios. The results highlight a systematic trade-off between stabilizing output and employment and maintaining fiscal sustainability in terms of the deficit and public debt. Across scenarios, instruments that influence both the demand side and potential output, most notably direct taxes and public investment in physical and human capital (including R&D-related spending), are optimal for cyclical stabilization while instruments with predominantly demand-side or budgetary effects, such as VAT, government consumption, and residual revenues, primarily assigned to budgetary consolidation. The qualitative patterns are robust across shocks and clarify how differential instrument effectiveness shapes the optimal timing and composition of policy adjustment under explicit constraints and stated policy objectives.

tldr: 该论文使用宏观计量模型和随机最优控制框架，为斯洛文尼亚在疫情后外部冲击下推导最优财政政策路径，发现产出与就业稳定和财政可持续性之间存在权衡，直接税和公共投资对周期稳定最有效，而增值税和政府消费主要用于预算巩固。
abstract_cn: 本文推导了斯洛文尼亚（一个欧元区小型经济体）在应对合理的暂时性外部冲击时可实施的中期财政工具路径。我们将宏观计量经济学模型SLOPOL12与随机最优控制框架相结合，其中目标函数基于对斯洛文尼亚政策制定者宏观经济优先事项的调查进行可操作化处理。利用OPTCON算法，针对基准预测及多种替代冲击情景，计算了近似最优政策。结果凸显了在稳定产出与就业、以及维持赤字与公共债务方面的财政可持续性之间存在系统性权衡。在不同情景下，同时影响需求侧和潜在产出的工具——最显著的是直接税以及对物质资本和人力资本（包括研发相关支出）的公共投资——对于周期性稳定而言是最优的；而主要具有需求侧或预算效应的工具，如增值税（VAT）、政府消费和剩余收入，则主要被用于预算整合。这些定性模式在不同冲击下均保持稳健，并阐明了在明确约束和既定政策目标下，差异化的工具有效性如何塑造政策调整的最优时机与构成。

title: Analisis Asas Pemungutan Pajak di Indonesia dalam Perspektif Maqashid Syariah
abstract: This study aims to analyze the principles of tax collection in Indonesia from the perspective of Maqashid Syariah to understand the compatibility between modern tax principles and the objectives of public welfare in Islamic law. The study uses a qualitative approach with a library study design and conceptual analysis. Data were collected through documentation of tax laws and regulations, fiscal policy documents, Maqashid Syariah literature, and national and international scientific articles published in the 2020–2025 period. Data validity was strengthened through source triangulation and audit trails, while data analysis used the Miles and Huberman interactive model which includes data condensation, data presentation, and conclusion drawing. The results of the study indicate that the principles of justice, legal certainty, benefit, and efficiency that form the basis of tax collection in Indonesia have substantive compatibility with the objectives of Maqashid Syariah, particularly in the protection of property (hifz al-mal), life (hifz al-nafs), intellect (hifz al-'aql), and descendants (hifz al-nasl). These findings confirm that taxes serve not only as an instrument for collecting state revenue, but also as a means of realizing social welfare and justice. This research contributes to the development of tax studies based on Maqasid Syariah and provides implications for the formulation of fairer, more transparent, and more welfare-oriented fiscal policies.
